input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for Toronto General Hospital. There are 11 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "general", "count": 3, "message": "3 general patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor general cluster trend"}, {"category": "mental", "count": 3, "message": "3 mental patients incoming", "protocol": "Crisis team activation \u2014 psychiatric surge"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": 534, "current_utilization": 18, "recommendation": "Capacity outlook stable for next 2 hours."}. Diversion recommendations: []. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: Toronto General Hospital has 11 incoming patients. Activate the crisis team for 3 incoming mental health patients, and monitor the trend for 3 general patients. Current capacity is stable with 18 patients, and no diversions are recommended at this time.
